drawingBoard.title: Drawing Board
drawingBoard.subtitle: Create and share diagrams, maps and visual models with your community.
drawingBoard.noDiagrams: No diagrams yet. Create one to start collaborating.

form.subtitle: Name your diagram and choose who can view it. You'll be taken straight to the editor.
form.diagramTitlePlaceholder: e.g., Food System Map, Q2 Strategy, …
form.visibilityNote: Only you can edit. Others with access can view.
form.visibilityNoteNoCommunity: Community visibility requires a linked community.
form.errorPrefix: Something went wrong. Please try again.

metadata.newDescription: Create a new diagram on the Drawing Board.

find.title: Community Systems Canvases
find.subtitle: Collective sensemaking — from a felt sense that something is wrong to a shared map of what's producing it.
find.empty: No canvases yet. Create the first one.

typeDescriptions.PROBLEM: A concrete, observed issue grounded in specific experience
typeDescriptions.PATTERN: The recurring dynamic behind multiple problems
typeDescriptions.ROOT_CAUSE: Underlying structural or behavioral condition producing the pattern
typeDescriptions.SOLUTION_PATTERN: A proven practice that addresses specific patterns
typeDescriptions.INTERVENTION: A concrete experiment the community is running or has run

diagnostic.title: Root Cause Diagnostic
diagnostic.subtitle: Quick orientation questions to help locate root causes. These are conversation starters, not instruments.
diagnostic.decisionClarity: How clear are decision-making roles to everyone affected? (1 = very unclear, 10 = crystal clear)
diagnostic.preDecisionDisagreement: How much does disagreement surface before decisions are finalized? (1 = rarely, 10 = always)
diagnostic.coordinationAwareness: How often do people act without knowing what others are doing? (1 = very often, 10 = rarely)

patterns.title: Pattern Library
patterns.subtitle: Community-governed commons of proven practices. Context-dependent — what works in one community may not transfer.
patterns.name: Pattern name

intervention.reflection: What was tried, under what conditions, what happened, what you'd tell another community

suggestions.title: Suggested patterns
suggestions.subtitle: Based on the problem or pattern you've described.

editSidebar.title: Title
editSidebar.deleteConfirm: Delete this node? This cannot be undone.
